title: Egyptian Cottage Cheese Pilaf
description: A Mexican-inspired pilaf dish made with Egyptian rice, cottage cheese, and crunchy elements.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the pilaf spice mix and stir for 1 minute.
Add the Egyptian rice and stir to coat with the spice mix.
Add 2 cups of water to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the water is absorbed.
Fluff the rice with a fork and stir in the cottage cheese until well combined.
Top with crunchy tortilla strips and chopped cilantro if desired.
Squeeze a sliver of lime juice over the top if desired.
